channel.title: Comments for page "Green Day"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Green Day"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I tried editing the word choice to make it less repetitive and suck-y. Hopefully it's better now.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: yeah, I can do that. Might take me awhile due to circumstances out of my control at the moment.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
GOC versus the Circus in a dystopian AU? Sign me up!

That said, no-vote at the moment. As it goes on, the writing gets notably poorer, with a lot of weak word choices and close word repetition, enough to drive me up a wall. Try reading it aloud and see if you can't spot them.

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
This tale was written sometime around July of this year. I wrote it in a hotel while me and my family had a day to kill before we had to board a cruise. I never had the real opportunity to get much critique until around a couple of days ago. It was mostly positive, and I decided to post it.

Thanks to Roget, DrChandra, and Kakroom for critique on this. Thanks to Metaphysician for writing 2912, which lead me to write 3036, which lead me to write this.

And yes, the title is ripping off Green Day. Sue me1

Also this was posted for my accounts 420th day of existence. Blaze it motherfuckers.

Footnotes
1. don't actually sue me
